CustomField.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the agency (warehouse) associated with this trip, regardless of direction. This is the primary filter key used by the calculation engine to retrieve all country-specific configuration rules: transport zones, truck types, rates, surcharges, and currency.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Country code of the agency handling this trip. Determines which country-specific pricing rules apply. Automatically populated — do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Country Code
